checks.a_analysis: The output content was compared against the source PDF. All headings, instructions, and descriptions in the output are present in the source document. No fabricated text or sections were identified.

The URL 'https://myncid.nc.gov/' is present in the source and correctly reproduced throughout the output. No other contact information (phone numbers, emails) exists in the body text of the source. The email address appearing in a screenshot in the source is captured in alt text or image descriptions, which is appropriate.
All eight major instructional sections spread across the three pages of the source document are present in the output. No sections or pages were omitted.
The source document does not contain any tables; therefore, no tables are missing in the output.

checks.check_name: Significant text omission within a section
checks.a_analysis: Each section's steps and notes were verified. All instructional steps (1-6 for registration, 1-7 for unlocking, etc.) and the 'Note' about automatic unlocking are present. Text that precedes or follows button images is correctly captured.

checks.check_name: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
checks.a_analysis: The output maintains the meaning of the source text. Minor structural changes, such as placing button descriptions into separate elements or using images with alt text to represent in-line buttons, are acceptable for accessibility purposes and do not alter the information conveyed.

checks.a_analysis: The content from the source document is correctly represented in the output without any instances of duplication. Each section and its respective steps (How to register, unlock, retrieve, reset, change, update, enroll, and delete) appears exactly once in the structured JSON, matching the source material.

The heading hierarchy is well-preserved. The main title 'MyNCID User Guide' is established as the primary section title. All instructional guides (e.g., 'How to register', 'How to unlock your account') are correctly nested as subsections of this main title. This reflects the logical organization of the multi-column source pages.
There are no tables in the source document or the output JSON.

The reading order in the JSON follows a logical top-to-bottom, left-to-right column progression across the three pages. It correctly groups instructional steps with their associated notes and images in the same sequence as intended in the visual layout of the guide.

The output contains several minor list conversion errors where continuous numbered lists are split into multiple JSON list objects. Specifically, in 'How to reset your password', items 7 and 8 are in separate lists. In 'How to enroll Open Subscription Applications', item 3 is separated from items 1 and 2. Most significantly, in 'How to delete your account', the text for step 3 ('3. Click on the... in the upper right corner...') is split into a list item and a subsequent paragraph because of the interspersed icon image, breaking the structural integrity of that list item.
checks.b_evidence_source: 3. Click on the [image] in the upper right corner and click on “Delete my account”. (Page 3, 'How to delete your account')
checks.b_evidence_output: List item: '3. Click on the ', followed by an image, then a paragraph: ' in the upper right corner and click on “Delete my account”.'
checks.b_evidence_location: Section 'How to delete your account', Page 3

checks.a_analysis: The URLs provided in the guide (e.g., https://myncid.nc.gov/) are accurately captured and represented as underlined text in the JSON items, matching their appearance in the source.

checks.a_analysis: The visual organization of the instructional content is severely compromised due to the rearrangement of visual elements. Images representing buttons and UI controls are detached from the text instructions that reference them and are placed into entirely different sections. For example, the 'SAVE' and 'CONFIRM' buttons from the 'How to register' section (Page 1) are rendered within the 'How to unlock your account' section in the HTML. Similarly, the 'Next' and 'Submit' buttons from the 'Unlock' section appear within the 'How to retrieve your username' section. This rearrangement breaks the logical flow and the instructional intent of the guide, making it confusing for a user to follow.
checks.b_evidence_source: In the source PDF, page 1, the 'How to register' section contains a 'SAVE' button image in step 4 and a 'CONFIRM' button image in step 5. The 'How to unlock your account' section contains 'Next' and 'Submit' buttons.
checks.b_evidence_output: In the HTML screenshot, the 'How to register' section lacks its buttons. Instead, the 'SAVE' and 'CONFIRM' buttons appear under the 'How to unlock your account' header. The 'Next' and 'Submit' buttons appear under the 'How to retrieve your username' header.
checks.b_evidence_location: Sections 'How to register', 'How to unlock your account', and 'How to retrieve your username' on Pages 1-2.

checks.a_analysis: The source document does not contain any tables; it consists of text lists and images of UI elements.

Several meaningful images from the source PDF are missing or improperly handled in the HTML output. Specifically, large screenshots of the UI for 'How to change your password' and 'How to update your profile' are missing (the latter replaced by a green placeholder). Additionally, the three-dots icon mentioned in step 3 of 'How to delete your account' is missing, leaving a gap in the sentence. The images of UI buttons throughout the document are also displaced or missing from their relevant steps as noted in Check V1.
checks.b_evidence_source: In the source PDF, Page 2 shows a large screenshot for 'How to change your password'. Page 3 shows an icon of three vertical dots in step 3 of 'How to delete your account'. Page 3 also shows a 'DELETE MY ACCOUNT' button image and a confirmation dialog image.
checks.b_evidence_output: The HTML screenshot for 'How to change your password' is missing the screenshot. The text in step 3 of 'How to delete your account' reads 'Click on the  in the upper right corner', missing the icon. The 'DELETE MY ACCOUNT' button and confirmation dialog images are also missing from the final section.
checks.b_evidence_location: Page 2 ('How to change your password', 'How to update your profile') and Page 3 ('How to delete your account').

checks.a_analysis: There is no visual duplication of text blocks or images observed in the HTML output.
